description_long: This is a cordless electric drill with a robust, ergonomic design, featuring a predominantly black and gray body accented by yellow highlights. The drill has a pistol-grip handle with a visible yellow trigger button and a large rectangular battery pack at the base, labeled '15.6V F 2.0Ah.' The front section includes a cylindrical chuck with a metallic drill bit attached, surrounded by a yellow collar with ventilation holes. The side of the drill displays a silver label with technical markings, and the overall surface is smooth with a semi-glossy finish. The drill's compact form and sturdy construction suggest it is suitable for both professional and home use in urban environments.
description: A cordless electric drill with a black, gray, and yellow color scheme, featuring a pistol grip, visible trigger, and a large battery pack. The front has a metallic drill bit and a yellow collar with ventilation holes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the handle, trigger, battery pack, and side label.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the rounded back of the drill and the top of the battery pack.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the handle, trigger, battery pack, and side label from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the drill bit, yellow collar, and the cylindrical chuck.
